checks.description: After a legal write operation (RW=0, EN=1) when not full, the EMPTY flag must deassert and dataOut may remain unchanged until a read occurs.
checks.pass_condition: EMPTY transitions to 0 within a conservative observation window after the write stimulus; no X or Z values observed.
checks.trigger_condition: When stimulus drives a legal write with EN=1, RW=0 and buffer not full.

checks.description: After a legal read operation (RW=1, EN=1) when not empty, dataOut must present the most recently written value.
checks.pass_condition: dataOut updates to the expected value within a conservative observation window; EMPTY may transition to 1 if buffer becomes empty.
checks.trigger_condition: When stimulus drives a legal read with EN=1, RW=1 and buffer not empty.

checks.description: Guardrail: No fixed-cycle latency is assumed for write or read completion; only externally visible flag changes are required.
checks.pass_condition: The design never asserts X or Z on observed signals and respects the conservative timing model.
checks.trigger_condition: Whenever a legal operation is applied.

checks.description: Boundary values for dataIn (all zeros and all ones) must not cause X or Z on any observed output.
checks.pass_condition: After applying zero or max dataIn with a legal write, outputs remain defined and stable.
checks.trigger_condition: When stimulus uses extreme dataIn patterns.
